requiredBehaviors: preserves source-root entries over home-level project entries
emits AgenC mcp_servers TOML for stdio and streamable HTTP servers
edgeCases: skips disabled servers and servers not included by enabledMcpjsonServers
skips placeholder command arguments and unsupported transports
ignores unsafe object keys while building migrated server maps

requiredBehaviors: reads settings.json and settings.local.json hook groups
copies hook scripts without overwriting existing target scripts
rewrites static source hook paths to the migrated AgenC hook directory
edgeCases: unsupported hook handlers and async handlers are skipped
dynamic or path-traversal hook suffixes are not rewritten

requiredBehaviors: reads frontmatter agent markdown and emits AgenC role TOML
maps source permission and effort fields onto AgenC config keys
renames supported command markdown into source-command skills
edgeCases: agents missing required frontmatter or body are skipped
unsupported command template features are skipped
